segments.content:
Subject: Re: Our photo — retouched version from the studio
From: Weiwei Bei <weiweibei@gmail.com>
To: Lucy Yang <lucyyang@gmail.com>
Date: Sat, 18 Oct 2025 16:22:30 -0000

You’re truly the best—you know my photo‑editing habits inside out! The only thing missing is my usual tweak of making my eyes bigger and brighter, but honestly this shot already looks great. I’ll send it to the studio as is.

Thanks again!
